title: Spicy Jamaican Pancakes
description: A twist on classic pancakes with a spicy Jamaican kick.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, whisk together pancake mix, jerk seasoning, and peppercorn.
2. In another bowl, whisk milk and eggs together.
3. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients and mix until combined.
4. Heat a non-stick pan with butter.
5. Drop batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto pan.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear.
7. Flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
8. Serve warm with your favorite toppings.
